name: dnsrpc_coerce_write
help: Used to force the ADIDNS server to write an empty log file into a specified location of choice.
long_help: Used to force the ADIDNS server to write an empty log file into a specified location of choice. Primarily used to verify that a given DC has the ability to reach whatever share you're going to host your final DLL payload on. Requires that the current process token belongs to a user which is a member of the DnsAdmins group. Note: Uses experimental exception hooking and may cause beacon instability.
